description: BENI economic narrative annotation schema — canonical reference
reference: See ANNOTATION_SCHEMA.md in annotation/ for full documentation

fields.name: economic_relevance
fields.description: Whether the article primarily discusses economic topics

fields.name: difficulty
fields.description: How clear-cut the economic relevance classification was

fields.name: economic_topic
fields.description: Specific economic domain the article addresses

fields.name: narrative_force
fields.description: Narrative framing — how the economic situation is portrayed

fields.name: valuation_target
fields.description: Who or what the narrative targets or evaluates

fields.name: sentiment
fields.description: Overall economic sentiment expressed in the article
